MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

MWCCPlayer_DShow C++

The features are as follows:

  • Use DShow interfaces for graph construction and filter connection, which implements the functions as MWCCPlayer_DRLib C++.
  • Use the CC708 Decoder dshow plugin, whose fundamental principles are the same as that used in the MWCCPlayer_DRLib C++ example. This example has wider applicability because it supports not only Pro and Eco capture cards, but also USB Gen2/Plus capture cards.

Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\VC++\GUI\MWCCPlayer_DShow

Supported Hardware

Magewell Pro/Eco/USB Gen2/Plus Capture family cards with SDI connectivity

Features

  1. Preview captured video and audio.
  2. Capture, decode and render CC data.
  3. Customize font, resolution, front color and background color of closed captions.

Workflow

  1. Build a DShow graph.
  2. Enumerate DShow filters of the capture card that are registered on the user's computer.
  3. Create a video renderer filter of VMR9 DShow.
  4. Create a Magewell CC708 Decoder DShow filter and call interfaces to read the device property.
  5. Connect the filters.
  6. Run the DShow graph.
  7. Stop the DShow graph, and exit the application.

Result

  1. Run the MWCCPlayer_DShow.exe.
  2. Select a capture device from the Devices drop-down list.
    Specify the capture device
  3. Check Set CC to specify CC Width and CC Height in the CC Size zone. It is recommended to set the same width and height of the captured video as that of the video source.
  4. Check CC to specify the CC channel and the font options.
  5. Click OK to save your configurations, then click RUN to preview the video with captions displayed.
    Preview CC
